subject: A silver-white-haired figure with long flowing hair in a dark outfit surrounded by swirling purple-pink energy — Baby in a powered form, likely Baby-Vegeta Super Saiyan form
description: A tall figure with long flowing silver-white hair stands centrally, wearing a dark outfit, enveloped in swirling pink-purple energy. The hair is long and dramatic, consistent with elevated power states in the Dragon Ball GT villain arc. The energy around the figure is dense and circular — swirling rather than radiating outward in rays, suggesting a gathered or charging technique rather than a release. The expression is partially visible and cold or menacing. The palette is dominated by dark purples, blacks, and magenta-pink energy, giving the card a distinctly villain-coded visual identity.
foreground: Long silver-haired figure in dark outfit surrounded by swirling magenta-purple energy
background: Swirling purple-pink energy vortex, dark void
